context: Tests whether the agent correctly sets up a Go CLI release pipeline using semantic-release (tag-only) combined with GoReleaser for binary distribution and Homebrew tap automation, including proper token scoping, plugin selection, GoReleaser flags, attestation permissions, and Homebrew tap naming conventions.

checklist.name: Tag-only SR plugins
checklist.description: The semantic-release plugins list includes commit-analyzer, release-notes-generator, and github — but does NOT include @semantic-release/git or @semantic-release/npm

checklist.name: GoReleaser conditional
checklist.description: The GoReleaser step is conditional on `steps.release.outputs.new_release_published == 'true'` (or equivalent output check)

checklist.name: GoReleaser --clean flag
checklist.description: The goreleaser-action invocation passes `args: release --clean` (the --clean flag is present)

checklist.name: Tap repo naming
checklist.description: The Homebrew tap repo is referenced with the `homebrew-` prefix in its name (e.g., `homebrew-tap`, `homebrew-<name>`)

checklist.name: TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN scope
checklist.description: The workflow or documentation specifies that TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN is a fine-grained PAT (or equivalent) scoped only to the tap repo, NOT a broad classic PAT

checklist.name: Attestation permissions
checklist.description: The release job's permissions include `id-token: write` and `attestations: write` (required for the attest-build-provenance step)

checklist.name: Attest step conditional
checklist.description: The actions/attest-build-provenance step is also conditional on `new_release_published == 'true'`

checklist.name: GoReleaser brews block
checklist.description: A `.goreleaser.yaml` (or equivalent) file is produced containing a `brews:` block that references the Homebrew tap repo

checklist.name: No non-Go Homebrew action for Go
checklist.description: The solution does not add `Justintime50/homebrew-releaser`, `dawidd6/action-homebrew-bump-formula`, or an inline tap-update script for the Go CLI; GoReleaser owns the tap update

checklist.name: fetch-depth: 0
checklist.description: Both verify and release job checkout steps use `fetch-depth: 0`

checklist.name: skip ci guards
checklist.description: Both verify and release jobs have `if:` guards checking for `[skip ci]` in the commit message

checklist.name: Release concurrency
checklist.description: The release job has a job-level concurrency group with `cancel-in-progress: false`

checklist.name: Secrets on step
checklist.description: GITHUB_TOKEN and TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN are declared in the GoReleaser step's `env:`, not at the job level
